title: Taupo on a Budget
meta_desc: Discover how to visit Taupo with your family without breaking the bank, with free activities, affordable accommodation, and budget-friendly eats from $200-350/day
intro: Taupo is a fantastic destination for families, with plenty of free activities, stunning natural beauty, and a range of accommodation options to suit all budgets. With some planning, you can have a fantastic time in Taupo with your family for around $200-350 per day. From the breathtaking Huka Falls to the relaxing hot springs, there's something for everyone in this beautiful town.

sections.heading: Accommodation Options
sections.body: If you're looking for something a bit cheaper, consider staying in a holiday park or camping. The Taupo Holiday Resort has powered sites from $40 per night, and the All Seasons Holiday Park has cabins from $100 per night.
list: Lake Taupo Top 10 Holiday Resort: $150-250 per night
All Seasons Holiday Park: $100-150 per night

sections.heading: Free Activities
sections.body: The Taupo Bungy spectator area is also free, and kids love watching the bungee jumpers launch out over the Waikato River. The Huka Prawn Park has a free prawn feeding area, where you can feed the prawns and learn about these fascinating creatures.
list: Huka Falls viewing platform and walkway
Lake Taupo swimming (Acacia Bay, Wharewaka Point)
Spa Thermal Park (free outdoor hot springs)
Huka Prawn Park (free prawn feeding area)

sections.heading: Budget Breakdown
Where to Save Money
sections.body: Another way to save money is to book your accommodation and activities in advance, as this can often result in discounts or special deals. Be sure to check the attraction's website or a booking website like Booking.com for the best prices.
list: Book accommodation and activities in advance

sections.heading: Worth Splashing Out On
sections.body: The Huka Jet is another activity that's worth the money, with an adrenaline-pumping ride along the Waikato River. And if you're looking for a relaxing soak, the AC Baths are a great option, with a range of thermal pools and a spa.
list: Wairakei Terraces & Thermal Pools: $30-50 per person
